examples.title: CSV Parser
examples.prompt_text: Fix the CSV parser to correctly handle quoted fields with embedded commas and newlines
examples.code_content:
import csv
from io import StringIO

def parse_csv(text):
    """Parse CSV text handling quoted fields correctly."""
    reader = csv.reader(StringIO(text))
    return [row for row in reader]
